meaning: n.(=Magdalene)从良的妓女,妓女收容所
examples: Magdalen College's bell tower and gardens are famous sights in Oxford.
Founders tower is also a tower in Magdalen College.
He little thought that the Magdalen might be at his side.
Magdalen College, Oxford, has also won the competition four times since the television series began in 1962.
Ms Meadows, who was born male, worked at St Mary Magdalen's Church of England Primary School in Accrington.
